why: Pivot default discovery away from enterprise-heavy wedges toward viral, X-native, culturally alive domains.
Reflect the user's current growth thesis in the repo-local pilot scaffold and operator artifacts.
inputs: User guidance emphasizing creator growth, gaming, AI agents, startups, productivity, careers, consumer utilities, crypto, and X-native personas.
verification: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-brief --input research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_CLUSTER_PACKETS_2026-03-24.json --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Viral Brief" --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_BRIEF_2026-03-24.md

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-materialize --input research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_CLUSTER_PACKETS_2026-03-24.json --output-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_viral_clusters_2026-03-24 --index-title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Viral Clusters" --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_CLUSTER_DIRECTORY_2026-03-24.json

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-progress --input-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_viral_clusters_2026-03-24 --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.json --markdown-output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_VIRAL_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Viral Progress"
next_step: Begin collection in creator-growth-systems using the viral/X-native persona brief.
